title: Mapouria lomamiensis
taxonomy: Mapouria lomamiensis is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Mapouria, which is a group of flowering plants. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The classification of Mapouria lomamiensis places it within the class Magnoliopsida and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The precise classification of Mapouria lomamiensis is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
